from distutils.core import setup
import toolkit_library
from toolkit_library import inspector

def read_modules():
    result = ''
    package = inspector.PackageInspector(toolkit_library)
    for module in package.get_all_modules():
        result += module.get_name() + '\n'
    return result

setup(
    name='toolkit-library',
    version='1.0.0',
    description='A library of common utilities',
    author='The Dev Team',
    author_email='dev@example.com',
    packages=['toolkit_library'],
    long_description=read_modules(),
)
